title: Update Media Buy Response
description: Response payload for update_media_buy task. Returns either complete success data OR error information, never both. This enforces atomic operation semantics - updates are either fully applied or not applied at all.

oneOf.title: UpdateMediaBuySuccess
oneOf.description: Success response - media buy updated successfully

media_buy_id.description: Seller's identifier for the media buy

status.description: Media buy status after the update. Present when the update changes the media buy's status (e.g., cancellation transitions to 'canceled', pause transitions to 'paused').

revision.description: Revision number after this update. Use this value in subsequent update_media_buy requests for optimistic concurrency.

implementation_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when changes take effect (null if pending approval)

invoice_recipient.description: Updated invoice recipient, echoed from the request when provided. Confirms the seller accepted the billing override. Bank details are omitted (write-only).

affected_packages.description: Array of packages that were modified with complete state information

valid_actions.description: Actions the buyer can perform after this update. Saves a round-trip to get_media_buys.

sandbox.description: When true, this response contains simulated data from sandbox mode.

oneOf.title: UpdateMediaBuyError
oneOf.description: Error response - operation failed, no changes applied

errors.description: Array of errors explaining why the operation failed
